meaning: n.螳晉浹蠎ｧ,[譛ｺ]遲貞､ｹ,螟ｹ螟ｴvt.髟ｶ霑帛ｺ募ｺｧ,陬ʒｭ貞､ｹ謌門､ｹ螟ｴ
examples: The collet shall be renewed when it is gravely oxidated.
Collet aimed the binoculars up the hill and adjusted image intensifier dials.
Lieutenant Collet had been expecting the question.
Bookshop owner Ian Collet said many shoppers went to Didcot, Witney or Oxford when the redevelopment work was going on.
The court heard Mr Collet, of Swithland Lane, Rothley, addressed the gathering at the Reservoir Tavern in Keighley on the same evening.
